message:
fix(shared): allow query params on GET endpoints with path params

Generated client methods for GET/DELETE endpoints with path params
were missing the ability to pass query parameters. For example,
agent.output (GET /agents/:agentId/output) needs to accept cursor,
limit, types, and wait as query params alongside the agentId path param.

Now all non-body methods (GET/DELETE) include an optional params
parameter for query strings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
